MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-24-2005 IN 206, DEFENDANT WILLIAM BUCK'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/4/05 IS CONTINUED TO 10/3/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
